meaning: n.钉,销,栓,大头针,别针,腿vt.钉住,别住,阻止,扣牢,止住,牵制
examples: Prick holes in the paper with a pin.

The only non-printed piece is a common hardware store nail used as its firing pin.
Allows anyone to pick up my phone and read, like, and comment without entering my pin.
